Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}All right, Odagiri, I'm counting on you. For both our sakes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Hey, Odagiri! What was that about? What did he mean by "for both our sakes"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}He just wants to create a better school environment, so he simply asked a student fit for the job.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Just like how the president asked him to join the student council to help out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}What!? You can't decide something like that without talking to the president first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Someone found a cigarette butt in the boys' bathroom.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And that teacher wants the disciplinary committee to look into whose it was.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Someone has broken school rules. It's only natural that I'm involved in finding and holding the transgressor accountable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}I wouldn't be so nonchalant about this if I were you, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}There was a cigarette found in the boys' bathroom... And in his eyes it doesn't matter if it's you or me. We're all suspects![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Quite the exaggeration. I'm not a crime scene investigator. I'm a member of the disciplinary committee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Look, you have two choices. Either help out and prove you can be trusted, or refuse and prove you can't.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 13 5 5 102}People like you and me have to deal with a lot of crap around here, don't we, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Odagiri seems to have[n]high expectations of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming better friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Well then, I'll be excusing myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}H-Hey! Don't ignore me! You kiss-ass![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Student council members shouldn't be fighting like this, should they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I better go tell the president![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My work is done here, so I'll head home.[n]{f 1 1}
